pred_reason: SWC-101 is justified due to identified integer overflow risks in arithmetic operations, specifically in the `getPrice` function and `FullMath.mulDiv`. SWC-107 is appropriate because the contract relies on external calls to UniswapV3Pool which, while view-only, still introduce external dependency risks. Evidence: Task 5 identifies overflow risk in (tickCumulatives[1] - tickCumulatives[0]) / twapInterval; Task 6 highlights overflow risk in FullMath.mulDiv at prod0 |= prod1 * twos; Task 2 confirms external calls to IUniswapV3Pool are view but represent external dependencies
